en: -♪ And I love you. And I need you. Nelly, I love you. I do need you. ♪
ja: 愛してる、必要としてる
vi: Va toi yeu ban, va toi can ban

en: -♪ Oh, you know I'm crazy over you. No matter what I do. ♪
ja: 君に夢中なのは知ってるでしょ

en: ♪ All I think about is you. Even when I'm with my boo. ♪
ja: 君のことしか考えない

en: ♪ You know I'm crazy over you. ♪
ja: 君に夢中なのは知ってるでしょ

en: -♪ I met this chick and she just knew right off the bat for me. ♪
ko: 나는 이 여자애를 만났고, 그녀는 내 바로 옆으로 이사 왔어
ja: この子に出会って、隣に引っ越してきた
zhTW: 我遇到這個女孩，她剛搬到我隔壁
vi: Toi gap co nang nay va co ay vua don den sat ben toi

en: ♪ And she got the hots for me, the finest thing I've ever seen. ♪
ko: 그녀는 나에게 반했어, 내 여자친구가 본 것 중 가장 매력적인 여자야
ja: 僕に気がある、彼女が見た中で最高
zhTW: 她對我有意思，是我女朋友見過最正的
vi: Co ay thich toi, dieu tot nhat nguoi yeu toi tung thay

en: ♪ Oh, no, no. She got a man and a son, though. Oh. ♪
ko: 하지만 안타깝게도, 그녀는 남자와 아들이 있어
ja: でも彼氏と息子がいる
zhTW: 但她有男朋友和一個兒子
vi: Nhung oi khong, co ay co ban trai va con trai

en: -♪ And that's okay, cause I wait for my cue and just listen, play my position. ♪
ko: 괜찮아, 나는 내 신호를 기다릴 거야
ja: でもいいよ、チャンスを待つから
zhTW: 但沒關係，因為我等待我的時機
vi: Nhung khong sao, vi toi se cho co hoi

en: ♪ Like a show star, pick up everything by me. And in no time, I bet I'll make this with her mine. ♪
ko: 모든 걸 챙기고, 내 고기를 들고, 곧
ja: 全部拾い集めて、すぐに
vi: Don het moi thu, va chang may choc

en: ♪ And that's for sure, cause I never been the type to break up a happy home. ♪
ja: それは確かだ、だって僕は、僕は決して
zhTW: 那是肯定的，因為我，我從不
vi: Va do la chac chan, vi toi, toi khong bao gio
